query:
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.accountCode,
  bi.category,
  sba.serviceExternalId as assignedService
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = bi.customerExternalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Denim%'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;
